source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A CMOS Schmitt-trigger inverter has a low output level of 0 V and a high output level of 5 V. It has input thresholds of 1.6 V and 2.4 V. The input capacitance and output resistance of the Schmitt-trigger are negligible. The frequency of the oscillator shown is __________ Hz. (Round off to 2 decimal places.)

agent_assessment.rationale: The text clearly states the Schmitt-trigger voltage levels and thresholds and asks for oscillator frequency. The image is necessary and clearly shows the RC feedback oscillator circuit with a 10 kΩ resistor and 47 nF capacitor connected to the Schmitt-trigger inverter, so the task and expected numeric answer are understandable.
